div.div:
Legend
• Solid line = synchronous AWS API call
• Dashed line = event-driven (S3 ObjectCreated, SNS, CodeBuild push)
• Thick red arrow = outbound HMAC webhook • Thick blue arrow = inbound SigV4 REST poll
• Colors match the zone each arrow starts in
